overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a walk through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood transitioning into Mirror Park. The scene features wet pavement from recent rain, palm-lined streets, and ends with crossing a green pedestrian bridge over a park lake with mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with wet pavement

events.description: dark sedan drives past on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk past suburban houses and mailboxes

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the road from left to right

entered.detail: two-story suburban house with yellow stucco exterior and red roof
low stone wall separating sidewalk from elevated front yard
wet concrete pavement with visible puddle reflections
two-lane suburban street with parked vehicles
standard blue USPS-style mailbox on the sidewalk edge
wooden telephone pole with multiple cross-arms and wires
tall palm trees lining the residential street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet suburban sidewalk in a residential neighborhood with yellow stucco houses and stone walls on the left. The pavement shows reflections from recent rain. A dark sedan passes by on the right as the camera approaches an intersection in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban intersection transitioning to park entrance

events.description: turning right off the sidewalk and entering Mirror Park
passing the Welcome to Mirror Park sign on the right

agents.ego_description: turning right at the street corner and walking into the park entrance

entered.detail: brown wooden sign with white text reading Welcome to Mirror Park
paved walkway leading into the park with grass on both sides
well-maintained green grass area of the park
white painted STOP text on the asphalt intersection
bright yellow fire hydrant at the street corner

segments.scene_description: Turning right at the suburban intersection, the scene transitions from residential street to parkland. The camera passes a wooden Welcome to Mirror Park sign and continues onto a paved park pathway surrounded by green lawns and palm trees, leaving the houses behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: park lakeside path with palm trees and benches

events.description: green pedestrian bridge becomes visible in the distance over the lake

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved park pathway beside the lake, passing benches and trash cans

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the sky and palm trees
green painted park bench facing the lake
black metal trash receptacle on the pathway edge
large hills and mountains forming the backdrop behind the park

segments.scene_description: Proceeding along the winding park pathway with dense palm trees on the left and a calm lake visible to the left. The path is lined with wooden benches and trash cans. In the distance, a green pedestrian bridge comes into view spanning the water, with mountains rising in the background.

events.description: entering the green metal pedestrian bridge over the lake

agents.ego_description: walking up and across the arched green bridge, with water visible on both sides

entered.detail: arched green metal bridge with wooden walkway surface
black metal ornamental gate at the bridge entrance

segments.scene_description: Ascending onto the green metal pedestrian bridge with ornamental gates, crossing over the park lake. The bridge has wooden decking and green railings, with calm water now visible on both sides. The camera walks up the arch of the bridge and descends toward the far shore, with the mountain backdrop remaining prominent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked suburban neighborhood into the lush, open greenery of Mirror Park. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk past yellow stucco houses and stone walls, where the pavement reflects the overcast sky as a dark sedan passes by. As the camera turns right at an intersection, the residential scenery gives way to parkland, passing a wooden welcome sign and transitioning onto a paved pathway lined with manicured lawns and palm trees. The scene then opens up along a winding path beside a calm lake, moving past wooden benches and trash cans before a green pedestrian bridge emerges against a backdrop of distant mountains. Finally, the camera ascends the arched metal bridge, crossing over the water between green railings before descending toward the far shore.
